programmes.show_description: Discover the New Beginnings collection, elegantly designed from hand-drawn artwork. Create beautiful natural designs with this range of elegant die sets.
Discover the calming beauty of Sanntangle - mesmerising designs that grow with every line and bring focus to your creative flow.
HobbyMaker's birthday celebrations are in full swing! Join Debby for 4th birthday bundles and discover brilliant deals, crafty favourites and amazing value.
Founded in 2014, Pinkfresh Studio is a creative brand dedicated to bringing fresh, modern, and versatile paper crafting products to makers around the world. Tune in for the launch!
Discover the New Beginnings collection, elegantly designed from hand-drawn artwork. Create beautiful natural designs with this range of elegant die sets.

Quilter Margaret Lee brings us her Cherwell Pure wool wholecloth quilt.
Discover beautifully coordinated quilt kits designed to make quilting simple and inspiring. Each kit brings together carefully selected fabrics and clear instructions.
...Cushion: Margaret Lee brings us these two wool applique projects in one kit.
Angie Attwood brings us two hours of Westerlee Rulers!
Angie Attwood brings us two hours of Westerlee Rulers!
Emma's on the guest list! She's back for more birthday celebrations with the brand new Dragon launch filled with beautiful Mythical moulds, paper packs, stickers and more.
Join us in welcoming the family-owned company, Lindy's Gang! Bursting with colour, creativity & fun, their sprays, powders and stamps are designed to inspire crafters.
Madhatters are known for their brilliant MDF & paper craft kits. Join Wendy for a fun, creative hour of crafting inspiration.
Join Ali for some fabulous birthday offers featuring £4 items and 40% offers on a range of mixed media materials, stamp sets, stencils, masks and more. Plus, enjoy a free gift!

Join us for TEXT{ures} launch. Born from Lou's love of hand lettering and her lifelong passion for mixed-media, where marks, textures and layered details tell their own story.
Send your loved ones hand made cards with a touch of luxury with Hunkydory's Scalloped Foiled Edge Card Blanks. Ready to be decorated however you desire!
